headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -78.6)
key_insights: Fears trending up 124% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 124 quotes and an overwhelming 96 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• At 70.5, frustration levels remain well above the typical range and stayed consistently high from yesterday's 63.3.

• Fears jumped dramatically from yesterday's -24.0 to 5.3, with 35 strong-intensity quotes driving the surge.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
